code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut sum = 0
    mut i = 0
    mut cur = ""
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
          if not string.is_empty(cur)
            match string.parse_int(cur)
            when Some(v)
              if v > 0
                sum = sum + v * 2
              end
            when None
              ()
            end
            cur = ""
          end
        else
          cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          sum = sum + v * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    print("result=#{sum}")
  when None
    print("result=0")
  end
end
